wpr_custom_css: @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cinzel:wght@400;600;700&family=Raleway:wght@300;400&display=swap'); #mg-wprm-wrap,#mg-wprm-wrap *{font-family:'Cinzel',serif!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap{background:#fcfbf7!important;} #wprmenu_bar{background:#18181b!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a{font-family:'Raleway',sans-serif!important;font-size:13px!important;letter-spacing:.18em;padding:15px 28px!important;color:#18181b!important;text-transform:uppercase;transition:all .3s;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(24,24,27,.05)!important;} #mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li>a:hover,#mg-wprm-wrap ul#wprmenu_menu_ul>li.current-menu-item>a{color:#d4af37!important;background:rgba(212,175,55,.04)!important;letter-spacing:.22em;} .luxury-header{background:#18181b;padding:32px 28px;text-align:center;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(212,175,55,.2);} .luxury-crown{font-size:28px;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;} .luxury-line{width:50px;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#d4af37,transparent);margin:0 auto 14px;} .luxury-header h4{font-family:'Cinzel',serif!important;color:#d4af37;font-size:16px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2em;margin:0 0 6px;} .luxury-header span{font-family:'Raleway',sans-serif!important;color:#a1a1aa;font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.25em;text-transform:uppercase;} .luxury-footer{padding:20px 28px;text-align:center;border-top:1px solid rgba(24,24,27,.06);} .luxury-footer span{font-family:'Raleway',sans-serif;font-size:10px;color:#71717a;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;display:block;margin-bottom:12px;} .luxury-footer-links{display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:16px;} .luxury-footer-links a{color:#d4af37!important;font-size:15px;transition:color .2s;} .luxury-footer-links a:hover{color:#18181b!important;}
